key_uncertainties: use-of-proceeds allocation between refinancing and new-build CapEx
blended coupon and tenor relative to existing stack
incremental impact on leverage ratios and IG rating headroom
2026-Q1.mgmt_statement_summary: Accessed capital markets during the quarter via a $2.5B investment-grade bond offering, marking continued execution of the IG-era financing playbook.

status_delta.detail: first quarter this asset appears in the lifecycle record

primary_framings_observed: Validation of investment-grade access at scale
Liquidity and refinancing runway for the new-build pipeline
Cost-of-debt trajectory under the Perfecta capital plan

currently_open_questions_as_of_2026Q1: What is the coupon, tenor, and tranching of the $2.5B issuance?
How are proceeds split between refinancing higher-cost debt and funding new-build / destination CapEx?
What is the pro-forma effect on net leverage and interest expense for FY2026?
Does this issuance change the cadence of expected future IG market access through 2027?
